title: ASR Outdoor 3in1 Waterproof Match Stick Storage Case Signal Mirror Fire Starter
description:
A must have for camping, backpacking, and hiking! This is a waterproof 3 in 1 match box container with a watertight seal, a fire starter on the bottom, and a convenient mirror in the cover. At just 3 inches tall, this compact storage container can easily be put in your pocket or backpack and keep your matches and other small items safe and dry. The fire starter flint on the bottom is easy to use and great for any time you need to have a fire outdoors. The mirror is ideal for signalling, but can also serve as a mirror for yourself. These storage containers are extremely lightweight and durable, and are a great addition to any survival kit

ASR Outdoor 3in1 Waterproof Match Stick Storage Case Signal Mirror Fire Starter

A must have for camping, backpacking, and hiking! This is a waterproof 3 in 1 match box container with a watertight seal, a fire starter on the bottom, and a convenient mirror in the cover.

Key Features

  • Waterproof & watertight seal
  • Signal mirror in screw cap
  • Small convenient size (3" tall)
  • Fire starter flint on bottom of container
  • Perfect accessory when camping or hiking

Product Specifications

  • MPN: 34061-AOZ20
  • UPC: 060886960553
  • Color: Green

At just 3 inches tall, this compact storage container can easily be put in your pocket or backpack and keep your matches and other small items safe and dry. The fire starter flint on the bottom is easy to use and great for any time you need to have a fire outdoors. The mirror is ideal for signalling, but can also serve as a mirror for yourself.

These storage containers are extremely lightweight and durable, and are a great addition to any survival kit. Don't forget one on your next adventure!

These match stick containers are durable and are great for camping, hiking, hunting, or for carrying in your survival kit.
